title: Incorrect simulation of nonoverlapped implication property

features.name: nonoverlapped implication in SVA assert property
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement using nonoverlapped implication operator (|=>) with a sequence expression on left side

features.name: event_control_triggered_SVA_assertion
features.description: Code should include an SVA assertion controlled by event expression using @ operator

features.name: sequence_expr_nonoverlapped_implication_to_property_expr
features.description: Code should include an SVA nonoverlapped implication where left side is a sequence expression (1) and right side is a property expression (1), using |=> operator
